name: pdf

mif.reason: PDF is a binary render format orthogonal to MIF markdown structure. It is composed directly from the SOURCES — the findings corpus and its primary-source citations — never from a rendered report, and carries the topic's MIF Level-1 identity in its document metadata. The MIF Level-3 source of truth lives in the generic report channel.

description: Produce a styled, print-ready PDF directly from the SOURCES — a topic's surviving findings and the primary materials its citations point to. Composes a comprehensive document (one section per finding + a complete References list) and renders it with pandoc, a title page, and rasterized Mermaid diagrams. Never built from a rendered report.
